message: Jake
Ginny
Gabriela
ＤＥＢＵＧ!!!
In Chapter 1,
through the interactions with,
the message changes.
Had H done it　　　　　　　　　　　》
I got the information from　　　　　　　　》
《Haven't received the business card or haven't met them together》
I received a call.
- It's Snipes.
I was waiting,
yes, nice to meet you.
Likewise, nice to meet you.
Is there anything else?
I heard about the delivery of the wrist from Director Fabar, so I came.
W-what's that?
They say the director told me to call upon hearing the wrist story.
That chatty guy!
Was he found?
Do you have any more questions?
Look
Talk
Listen
Think
Move
System
The surroundings
of the ring
The　details　of　the　request
About the company
About　the　matter
The　wrist　incident.
About.

To another place.
Save.
End the game.
The office is a simple space devoid of any waste, with all interior made of rattan.
It’s filled with a bright atmosphere like a travel agency for resorts.
This room is the president's office = (
so it's just me and
no one else.
I think it’s rude to care about a woman’s age, but this woman probably looks younger than her actual age.
She’s sitting in a rattan chair with her back to the window.
Impressive red hair. She must have been quite a catch when younger.
Her confident demeanor likely indicates that her work is going well.
The design is such that baby pearls surround the ruby, and this ring itself is quite heavy.
If all of this is real, then the giver must be wealthy.
With something this grim, isn’t it a case that should be left to the police?
I’m counting on you.
If this turns into a police case,
our company is done for.
I’m also exasperated with Martin. He just blurts things out.
Please don't blame the director. He was very worried.
Well, I suppose.
But I really don’t want it to become a police matter. So please, don’t say anything to the police.
You're the only one I can rely on. Please help me.
I’m not good at small talk, so I’ll be direct. Our exclusive has gone missing, please find them.
Ah, yes. By the way, specifically what?
Yes.
So that means it’s OK.
Ah, yes.
We'll cover transportation costs as necessary expenses. How much should I pay on top of that?
I'll calculate the total time spent searching at $25 an hour.
Got it. Plus necessary expenses, right? For now, I'll deposit $500.
I asked because Martin knows someone, but please ensure this never leaks to the outside.
Of course.
You see, we have many celebrities as clients. That's why we want to avoid any fuss. I appreciate it,
What happened?
I just hope nothing bad has happened.
You're the only one I can rely on. Please.
The girl who went missing is commonly known as “
Her name is Annette Wheaton.
? I feel like I've heard that name somewhere.
Do you know our system?
Ah, no.
I'm sorry.
It's fine. It would be odd if you knew all about that. Hehe.
She was supposed to contact me three times a day, but I haven't heard from her for the last two days.
Has this happened before?
She was a good, serious girl. She’s never missed contacting me, no matter what.
At this point, I think there's a high possibility she got involved in some kind of incident.
You're the only one I can rely on. Please.
Our company is an escort service recruitment agency. It sounds good, but in the end, it’s a high-end prostitution referral agency.
Ah.
Our staff is top-notch.
I scouted her while she was working as a waitress in a shabby restaurant.
I have no complaints about the management. Everything is going well. But there are those who bring trouble to us.
What do you mean by that?
So, there are guys who get all choked up over their cute daughters and cry when they get brushed off.
I hope she hasn't gotten involved in any weird trouble.
I need to bring her back safely, please.
She's our number one. Look, this is her.
Right.
She's a beautiful person.
Yeah, she has that type of charm that guys love.
Even though she does this kind of work, she's a nice, cute daughter. I'll leave this photo with you.
The possible reasons for her losing contact could be getting wrapped up in some trouble, or running away with a guy,
or maybe she's just somewhere out there dead.
It's hard to believe she'd be dead somewhere.
It's not very auspicious to even say that when we're about to start searching.
This is New York. Nothing would be too strange, right?
She might be held captive by some guy,
but I can't believe she'd be dead.
I’d like to hear about the
wrist incident
you mentioned.
What do you mean?
Well, if we're calling it an incident, I guess it is.
It happened two days ago. At night, there was something like a parcel left in front of this office.
At first, I thought it was a prank or something, but I had my bodyguard open it out of curiosity.
And inside, there was a severed wrist.
That's right. A left hand cleanly wrapped up was inside. At first, I thought it was fake and contacted Martin.
But how did you think it was
her wrist?
Because the ring
she wore was on it.
A ring?
Yeah, it was this one.
Quite a distinctive design, right? It seems that
she got it from someone.
It looks like a custom design, doesn't it?
Right? I don't know if it was a gift from some customer or a lover, but she took really good care of it.
I'm going to entrust you with this ring.
Now go catch that perverted man who's holding her captive!
Once we get that guy, I'll let the bodyguards handle the rest.
As for her,
she's missing her left hand.
We need to find her quickly; she might die otherwise.
I can't tell her age, but she gives off a capable impression.
I wonder about her relationship with Director Fabar, but surely she can't be just one of his lovers.
If she's had her left hand severed,
her life is definitely at risk.
Are you saying we should search for an employee who has lost contact?
Is that right?
If that's the case, it seems like it wouldn't hurt to ask the police.
But hiring a detective just two days after losing contact seems a bit hasty, doesn't it?
Has anyone tried looking for her,
or visiting her home?
It seems like the police situation is more worried about her safety. A legitimate organization shouldn't have to worry about that.
What could be the reason for wanting to avoid police involvement?
Is it the escort service company?
Is Director Fabar a customer here?
When it comes to an escort service for celebrities, things could get complicated.
If her left hand was sent to us,
it means there's a chance she's already been killed.
Could it be that she's the victim of a serial murder case? No, I've never heard of any severed parts being sent to the victims' homes before.
If that's the case, is it revenge?
Even if she's alive, it’s definitely a dire situation.
Is that about her, I wonder?
Could it be about that?
She said she was a call girl. This
must be her agent, right?
So, it really was that
after all.
If what she did to me is normal,
then surely it couldn't be from too much drugs,
could it?
Is that about that
thing?
She said she was a call girl. This
must be her agent, right?
So, it really was that
after all.
She shared a lot with me, but if she's the type to talk about her secrets with famous people, the chances of being resented are high.
I wonder where that guy is?
I think there was a woman with Tony Ford who had that name?
Looking at the photo, she does seem like one of Tony's companions. I wonder if I could find out something by asking him?
※※※ It's a bug ※※※
